title: neolitsea bidoupensis
intro: Neolitsea bidoupensis, also known as Bidoup neolitsea, is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae, native to Vietnam. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Neolitsea bidoupensis include its ability to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Herbal preparations of Neolitsea bidoupensis include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional Vietnamese medicine.
